notes: Extended cases for iterative queue reversal using a stack.

cases.name: sample_reverse_queue
expect_contains_all: The resulting queue after reversing its elements is: 5 4 3 2 1

cases.name: even_length_queue_reversed
expect_contains_all: The resulting queue after reversing its elements is: 40 30 20 10

cases.name: single_item_queue_stays_same
expect_contains_all: The resulting queue after reversing its elements is: 99
